underlying_goal: Check and summarize AWS Bedrock Claude model usage metrics, particularly token counts and invocations for specific models
friction_detail: Initial model ID was wrong (bare anthropic.* vs us.anthropic.*) returning no token data, and S3 log querying for per-user usage was too slow and got interrupted.
brief_summary: User wanted to check their AWS Bedrock Claude usage metrics; Claude successfully fetched account-wide data and created a skill, but per-user filtering via S3 logs was too slow and the user stopped the session.
